name: Antoine Poinsot
cooked: Each block took around 5 seconds to validate on my laptop with a performant CPU. When has everyone first seen 1) the headers 2) the content of the blocks? Was anyone stuck with peers that took a few seconds to send the block content as they were still validating it?
topic_title: Consensus Cleanup: demo of slow blocks on Signet
